Questions and answers

Frequently asked questions

Navigate to the Sound Effects section and click on the History tab. For each of your previously generated sound effects, you'll see two icons on the right: the first one allows you to download, and the second lets you share it on the Explore page.
It's simple: just describe the sound you have in mind and we'll generate a few sample sound effects to choose from. You can then upscale the one you like the most, or continue generating until you find the sound effect that works for you.
Our model can generate royalty-free sound effects for practically any use case. The sounds are ideal for film production, commercial ads, media, commercials, and video game development. Whether you need explosion sound effects, gunshot SFX, or background ambience, our extensive free sound effects library makes it easy to find the perfect audio. Additionally, users looking to create custom soundboards for personal or business use can take advantage of our sound effect generator, which lets you design unique sound effects from scratch. Soundboards are widely used in Discord voice chats, live streaming, and gaming, allowing users to trigger meme sound effects, funny sound effects, and custom SFX in real time. Content creators and video editors can use our platform to download free sound effects or generate original SFX for YouTube videos, podcasts, and social media content.
Yes! As long as you have a paid account, you can use our sound effects royalty-free in commercial projects, including YouTube videos, social media content, and even advertising (free users may only use the services for non-commercial purposes). We provide high-quality free sound effects for video editing, including explosion sound effects, horror screams, and gunshot SFX. And if you need something completely original, our sound effect generator allows you to create and customize your own sounds from scratch. No copyright worries—just unique, professional-quality sound effects for your content. However, as with all of our services, we ask that you do not sell or license our tools or use the output to develop competitive products or services. Please refer to our terms for more details.
You can browse and download free sound effects for video editing, game development and more from our massive library, featuring everything from explosion SFX and horror screams to classic meme soundboard effects. But if you're looking for something unique, our sound effect generator lets you create custom sound effects from scratch. Whether you're editing a video, designing a game, or just need the perfect sound effect button for a prank, you can easily generate, modify, and download your own sounds in MP3 format —all royalty-free.
Royalty-free sound effects are sounds that you can use without worrying about copyright restrictions. They're perfect for YouTube videos, podcasts, video games, and other creative projects. Our platform offers a massive selection of free royalty-free sound effects, covering everything from explosion sound effects and gunshot SFX to more niche options like dog bark SFX and record player sounds. Plus, if you want something unique, you can generate your own royalty-free sound effects from scratch using our sound effect generator. If you're on a paid plan, all our sound effects and royalty-free SFX can be used in commercial projects, including YouTube videos, social media content, and even advertising.
Sound effects buttons make it easy to play hilarious sounds with just one tap. Whether you need a classic fart sound effect, a loud air horn, or a perfectly timed cricket sound effect for awkward moments, we’ve got you covered. And if you can’t find the perfect sound, no problem—our sound effect generator lets you create your own sound effects and add them to your soundboard buttons. Make custom prank sounds, mix meme SFX, or tweak existing effects to fit your style.
